text:
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"4","subject":"Build simplified wizard component","description":"Replace the current builder page wizard with a simplified one-page wizard at /Users/ggomes/dev/ekoa-dev/ekoa/components/builder/configuration-wizard.tsx:
- Everything on ONE page (not multi-step)
- Shows artifact type selection as cards at top
- Shows artifact-specific fields below (when type selected)
- Shows integration selection below
- Shows quality refinements section with TESTING OFF by default
- Has a prominent "Start Building" button
- Defaults should be pre-selected where possible
- Freeform/no-template option should be available
- The wizard appears after user sends first message, showing AI-suggested type
- Collapsible sections for less important options
- Clean, minimal design following existing app patterns
Reference ConfigurationWizard.tsx and sub-panels in /Users/ggomes/dev/ekoa-dev/app/src/components/orchestration/ for logic.","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-02-27T21:22:52.956Z"}

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"5","subject":"Build chat panel with essential-only output","description":"Rebuild the chat panel at /Users/ggomes/dev/ekoa-dev/ekoa/components/builder/chat-panel.tsx:
- Show only ESSENTIAL output from the agent in chat: user messages, key status updates, phase transitions, final results, errors
- Filter out verbose tool_use, tool_result, and detailed progress from chat view (these go to output tab)
- Show a compact progress indicator during execution (phase name + spinner)
- Message input with file attachment support (click to select files)
- Cancel/stop button during execution
- Auto-scroll to bottom on new messages
- Quick action buttons for common prompts
- Markdown rendering for assistant messages
- Code blocks with syntax highlighting
- Show file attachment chips before sending
Reference ChatPanel.tsx in /Users/ggomes/dev/ekoa-dev/app/src/components/orchestration/ for patterns but significantly simplify the output.","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-02-27T21:22:53.398Z"}

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"6","subject":"Build output tab with colored terminal formatting","description":"Build the output tab component at /Users/ggomes/dev/ekoa-dev/ekoa/components/builder/output-panel.tsx:
- Shows ALL output from the agent (everything the chat panel filters out, plus more)
- Terminal-style dark background with colored text
- Color coding: green for success/status, blue for tool names, yellow for progress, red for errors, gray for tool results, white for regular output
- ANSI-like color formatting (can use a library like ansi-to-html or custom CSS)
- Monospace font
- Auto-scroll with scroll-lock (pause auto-scroll when user scrolls up)
- Show timestamps for each entry
- Show phase headers/separators
- Show tool use details (which tool, what input, what result) in a structured way
- Show file operations clearly (created, modified, deleted with paths)
- Copy button for output
- Clear button
- The current mock output in the side panel is a good reference for style
This should look like a professional terminal/IDE output panel.","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-02-27T21:22:53.967Z"}

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"7","subject":"Build preview panel with iframe and controls","description":"Rebuild the preview panel at /Users/ggomes/dev/ekoa-dev/ekoa/components/builder/preview-panel.tsx:
- Iframe showing the running app via proxy URL
- Viewport size switching (Desktop, Tablet 768px, Mobile 375px)
- Status indicator (building, starting, running, failed, stopped)
- Refresh button (reload iframe)
- Open in new tab button (opens proxy URL in new browser tab)
- Stop app button (calls stopPreview API)
- Loading skeleton while app starts
- Error display when app fails
- Port info display
- The preview should auto-open when deployment events indicate app is running
Reference PreviewPanel.tsx in /Users/ggomes/dev/ekoa-dev/app/src/components/orchestration/ for patterns.","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-02-27T21:22:54.503Z"}

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"8","subject":"Build file tree component","description":"Build/improve the file tree component at /Users/ggomes/dev/ekoa-dev/ekoa/components/builder/file-tree-panel.tsx:
- Shows files created/modified/deleted by the agent
- Tree structure with folder expand/collapse
- File type icons (or indicators)
- Show status (created=green, modified=blue, deleted=red)
- Extract file operations from streaming output events
- Clickable files (future: open in editor)
Reference FileTreePanel.tsx in /Users/ggomes/dev/ekoa-dev/app/src/components/orchestration/ for patterns.","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-02-27T21:22:55.046Z"}

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"9","subject":"Integrate all components and wire up the builder page","description":"Wire up the main builder page at /Users/ggomes/dev/ekoa-dev/ekoa/app/(dashboard)/page.tsx:
- Connect all components to stores and hooks
- Implement the full workflow: message -> wizard -> execute -> stream -> preview
- File attachment flow: select -> display chips -> send with message
- Stop/cancel: button clicks -> API call -> update state
- Session switching: load session -> restore state -> reconnect stream if active
- Preview auto-open on deployment events
- Side panel tab switching (files, output, preview)
- Error handling for all API calls
- Loading states everywhere
- Handle edge cases (reconnect, stale state, etc.)
This is the main integration task that brings everything together.","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-02-27T21:22:55.807Z"}

What's your current progress? Have you started writing code? Please prioritize:
1. First create the configuration-wizard.tsx and output-panel.tsx (new files)
2. Then rewrite chat-panel.tsx, sessions-panel.tsx, side-panel.tsx  
3. Finally wire up page.tsx

Start writing code immediately - you have all the context needed. The stores and hooks are ready at /Users/ggomes/dev/ekoa-dev/ekoa/stores/ and /Users/ggomes/dev/ekoa-dev/ekoa/hooks/.
summary: Checking progress, pushing to start coding
